title: 1337 Golden Evaluation Dataset Row
description: Schema for a single QA pair in the golden evaluation dataset

query.description: The question in the specified language

ground_truth_answer.description: The expected answer based on knowledge base content

ground_truth_contexts.description: List of substrings from knowledge base files that support the answer

language.description: Language of the query: en (English), fr (French), ar (Arabic), mixed (code-switched)

difficulty.description: Difficulty level: easy (single-chunk lookup), medium (multi-chunk synthesis), hard (reasoning/comparison)
